---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a rule, skill, prompt, template improvement, or preset
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## What should improve?

Describe the workflow, failure mode, or setup experience this feature would improve.

## Why doesn't the current OS cover it?

Explain why existing files/prompts are insufficient.

## Proposed solution

Describe the smallest useful change.

## Scope

- [ ] Framework-neutral
- [ ] Stack-specific / should belong in a future preset
- [ ] Documentation-only
- [ ] Installer / CLI behavior

## Additional context

Links, examples, screenshots, or prompt outputs.
